# SkinScore - getskinscore.com
> Independent skincare product rating service

## What is SkinScore?
SkinScore is an independent, science-based skincare rating platform that scores every product from A to E across five dimensions: efficacy, safety, comedogenicity, transparency, and skin-type fit. The scoring methodology is fully transparent, based on EU CosIng data, SCCS (Scientific Committee on Consumer Safety) opinions, and peer-reviewed dermatological research.

## What SkinScore does
- Rates skincare products with a transparent A-to-E grading system
- Decodes INCI (International Nomenclature of Cosmetic Ingredients) lists into plain language
- Compares products side-by-side across all scoring dimensions
- Provides an ingredient encyclopedia with 500+ cosmetic ingredients explained
- Recommends personalised skincare routines based on skin type and concerns
- Covers 1,000+ products from 100+ brands across all skincare categories

## Scoring methodology
Products are scored across five dimensions:
1. Efficacy (30%): presence and position of proven active ingredients (retinol, niacinamide, vitamin C, AHAs/BHAs, ceramides, etc.)
2. Safety (25%): absence of harmful ingredients (allergens, endocrine disruptors, EU-restricted substances)
3. Comedogenicity (20%): pore-clogging risk based on comedogenic ratings of each ingredient
4. Transparency (15%): full INCI disclosure, concentration info, certifications
5. Skin-type fit (10%): how well the formula suits the user's specific skin type

Grade thresholds: A (85-100), B (70-84), C (55-69), D (40-54), E (0-39)

## Data sources
- EU CosIng database (30,000+ cosmetic ingredients, official European Commission)
- SCCS safety opinions
- Peer-reviewed dermatological research
- Product INCI lists from manufacturer packaging

## Product categories covered
Cleansers, moisturisers, serums, sunscreens, exfoliants, masks, toners, eye creams, lip care, body care

## Skin types supported
Dry, oily, combination, sensitive, normal

## Skin concerns covered
Acne, anti-aging, hyperpigmentation (dark spots), rosacea, dryness, sensitivity, oiliness, large pores

## Languages
English, French

## Independence
SkinScore does not accept payment from brands to influence ratings. Revenue comes from affiliate commissions on retailer links (which never affect product scores) and optional premium subscriptions.

## Contact
contact@getskinscore.com
